docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-28-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NISSENBAUM, SELA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-29-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT SELA NISSENBAUM PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY PENA, GERARD AS TO DEFENDANT NISSENBAUM, SELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-29-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENA, GERARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NISSENBAUM, SELA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY PENA, GERARD NISSENBAUM, SELA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
